chapter.label: Tale 198
chapter.title: The reply of saint ATHANSIOS, cucharist in his presence. The brother (who was a deacon) said to

paragraphs.text: BISHOP OF ALEXANDRIA, him: ‘Father, these things which you say at the eucharist are not in TO <THE QUESTION OF> WHETHER accordance with the orthodox faith; they are hercsy <not orthodox ONE CAN BE BAPTISED WITHOUT FAITH but kakadox>. Since the cider could see angels when he was celebrating, he paid no attention to what was said, and thought Saint Athanasios, the Pope of Alexandria, was once asked whether nothing of it. But the deacon went on saying: “You are at fault, a person could be baptised whose beliefs were not in accordance good elder; the Church does not allow those things to be said”.

178 The Spiritual Meadow John Moschos 179 When the elder realised that he was being accused and blamed by the youth answered that he did. ‘Since you thought like that and the deacon, the next time he saw the angels, he asked them: “When dedicated your entire course of action to Christ in order to gain a the deacon speaks to me like this, what am I to make of it? They share in my offering, from this day forward I make you my son and said to him: ‘Pay attention to him; he is giving good counsel’. The heir’. He took him with him and made him his heir. elder said to them: “Then why did you not tell me so? They said: ‘Because God has ordained that men should be corrected by men’, 201. THE LIFE OF A MOST NOBLE MAN and from that time forth he accepted correction, giving thanks to OF CONSTANTINOPLE WHOSE FATHER, God and to the brother. WHEN HE WAS DYING, LEFT HIM THE LORD JESUS CHRIST AS HIS GUARDIAN
